title: space_set: simple-property skip list duplicated in Phase 1 and Phase 2 loops
description: Scenario: maintainer adds a new simple Space property (e.g. 'icon'). They must update three places: (1) the matches!(path, 'name' | 'description') skip in the Phase 1 validation loop at jmap.rs:1147, (2) the same skip in the Phase 2 apply loop at jmap.rs:1191, and (3) the update_space_props store call. Missing any one of the skip locations causes the new property to hit validate_member_patch and return invalidPatch. The duplication is not obvious — Phase 1 and Phase 2 are separated by ~40 lines of code with the atomicity-gap comment in between. Fix: extract a is_simple_space_prop(path: &str) -> bool helper and call it in both loops. Or restructure to partition patch_map into (simple, member) slices in one pass.
